steps.title: Identify what needs supporting
steps.content: The underlined claim states the novel “resembles classic magical realist novels in its juxtaposition of literary realism with folklore.” The claim's crucial element is juxtaposition—the specific way these two elements interact to create the effect.

steps.title: Find the quotation showing this interaction
steps.content:
Choice C directly demonstrates this by describing how the realistic plot is disrupted by folkloric elements in a productive, recurring way—exactly the kind of textual interplay that defines magical realism.

The other three either acknowledge both elements without showing their dynamic tension, or focus on literary influences rather than how elements interact in the work itself.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
